title: Engine capability backlog required before A1 can be accepted

items.problem: Current renderer creates a short teacher_guide PDF, not the full A1 Teacher Binder.
items.required_capability: Render a complete teacher binder with unit overview, 10-day sequence, daily teacher moves, differentiation, assessment look-fors, model response calibration, source tracker, marking notes, and safety language.

items.problem: Current renderer creates a short task_sheet PDF, not the full A1 Student Packet.
items.required_capability: Render a complete student packet with vocabulary organizer, Handouts 1-10, final assessment, and exit tickets.

items.problem: Final assessment, rubric, model response bank, calibration notes, and completion check are not a separate output.
items.required_capability: Render a separate A1 Assessment Pack.

items.problem: Safety redirects, source tracker, and excerpt bank are not preserved as a package output.
items.required_capability: Render a separate A1 Safety and Source Pack for teacher use.

items.problem: Current proof renders one day deck only.
items.required_capability: Render daily slide decks for Days 1-10 or a clearly sectioned A1 slide bundle preserving all ten days.

items.problem: Current workflow produces PDFs/PPTX but not editable teacher/student/assessment/source documents.
items.required_capability: Export editable DOCX or a supported editable source-equivalent for binder, packet, assessment pack, and safety/source pack.

items.problem: Current QA accepts existence and minimum size rather than complete package structure.
items.required_capability: Fail renders that do not include every required A1 document and section from the package contract.
